ingredients_text: White Bread (65%) (Wheat Flour (with added Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin), Water, Salt, Yeast, Emulsifiers (Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids, Mono - and Dicetyltartaric Acid Esters of Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids), Sprit Vinegar, Wheat Protein, Rapeseed Oil, Flour Treatment Agent (Asorbic Acid), Wheat Flour), Soft Cheese (16%) (Cream (Milk), Skimmed Milk, Milk Solids, Culture (Lactococcus Bacteria)), Barber's Mature Cheddar (6%) (Pasterurised Cow's Milk, Vegetarian Rennet, Salt, Starter Culture), Soft Spread (3%) (Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed Oil, Palm Oil), Water, Salt, Emulsifier (Mono - and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids), Preservative (Potassium Sorbate), Colour (Annatto Bixin, Curcumin), Aidity Regulator (Citric Acid), Flavouring).
